Chronology of every recorded fact about [[madra]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Unsouled ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 1''' — Madra is described as the raw power of spirit and the material from which souls are made.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 3''' — Sacred artists have a madra-reinforced constitution.}}

== Soulsmith ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 1''' — Madra is a practitioner's internal power that can be cycled and refined.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 4''' — Madra is a resource that can be exhausted and circulated in limbs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 11''' — Madra can be pure.}}

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 5''' — Madra can be used to power training course circles.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 11''' — Cycling aura changes the nature of madra and teaches the core to generate madra of that aspect.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 5''' — Madra is a system that can break and bend physical laws.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
